Funding

Source: vignettes/articles/funding.Rmd
funding.Rmd

This project is in general funded by Statens Serum Institut.

Specific parts of this project co-funded by the European Union

  • The modelling of spatially structured populations is funded via the PAIR project

  • The modelling of waning immunity is funded via the DURABLE project

Developed by Rasmus Skytte Randløv, Lasse Engbo Christiansen, Kaare Græsbøll, Sofia Myrup Otero, Statens Serum Institut, EU.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
